title: Manicare Afro Comb For Detangling And Styling, Hair Comb For Curly, Wavy, Frizzy And Afro Hair, Wide Tooth Anti-Static, Smooth Afro Pick, Reduces Breakage, Pulling And Gentle On The Hair And Scalp

features: MANICARE AFRO COMB – Smooth wide tooth traditional plastic afro pick; Suitable for all hair types and lengths, can be used on wet or dry hair
DETANGLING AND STYLING – The wide tooth afro comb is perfect for detangling knots, tangles, perms and curls; Use to groom and style hair, ideal for curly, frizzy, thick, wavy and afro hair

ANTI-STATIC – Made from quality heat resistant, anti-static material to help reduce frizz and restore dry and damaged hair; The wide tooth comb is gentle on the hair and scalp and is designed to reduce breakage and pulling

ERGONOMIC – The comb is designed to be lightweight and comfortable to use, the non-slip rounded handle is easy to grip and easy to use; Quality comb for everyday use on all the family at home or for salon professional hairstyling
MANICARE - Manicare offers a comprehensive range with everything needed for a perfect head to toe pamper; Manicare offers 100% guarantee on all its products
description: Product Description The Manicare afro comb is made from a quality ant-static material, with its rounded, wide tooth design it is gentle on the hair and scalp by reducing breakages and pulling. Perfect for detangling knots and tangles. Can be used for grooming and styling. The afro comb is ideal for thick, frizzy, wavy, curly and afro hair. Can be used on wet or dry hair. The ergonomic design makes it easy to hold and easy to use. The curved, non-slip handle makes it perfect for everyday use. Manicare has been manufacturing high quality beauty and hair accessories for over 35 years. Manicare offers a comprehensive range of products with everything you need for the perfect head-to-toe pamper. Each product and category has been carefully designed and selected to offer all the latest beauty must haves. Whether you want to perfect your make-up application, create a salon finish manicure or indulge in a relaxing pedicure - the Manicare collection has all the essential tools you will need. Manicare is renowned for quality and is proud to offer a 100% guarantee on all of its products. Directions To detangle, start with the tips and gradually move up. Divide the hair into sections if necessary. Use on wet or dry hair.
